sentences.target: Ich lese deinen Blog jeden Abend.

translations.de: Ich lese deinen Blog jeden Abend.
translations.en: I read your blog every evening.
translations.es: Leo tu blog todas las noches.
translations.fr: Je lis ton blog tous les soirs.
translations.it: Leggo il tuo blog ogni sera.
translations.ru: Я читаю твой блог каждый вечер.
translations.he: אני קורא את הבלוג שלך כל ערב.
translations.vi: Tối nào tôi cũng đọc blog của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik lees je blog elke avond.
translations.hi: मैं हर शाम तुम्हारा ब्लॉग पढ़ता हूँ।
translations.el: Διαβάζω το blog σου κάθε βράδυ.
translations.nb: Jeg leser bloggen din hver kveld.
translations.id: Saya membaca blog kamu setiap malam.
translations.sv: Jag läser din blogg varje kväll.
translations.ro: Îți citesc blogul în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Jeg læser din blog hver aften.
translations.ja: 毎晩あなたのブログを読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Blog'; masculine accusative singular (direct object).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'lese'.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'Abend'; accusative masculine singular; forms a temporal accusative.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; part of the adverbial time phrase 'jeden Abend'.

translations.en: She is starting her blog today.
translations.he: היא משיקה את הבלוג שלה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy ra mắt blog của mình.
translations.nl: Ze begint vandaag met haar blog.
translations.hi: वह आज अपना ब्लॉग शुरू कर रही है।
translations.nb: I dag lanserer hun bloggen sin.
translations.sv: I dag startar hon sin blogg.
translations.da: Hun starter sin blog i dag.
translations.ja: 今日ブログを始めます。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person nominative subject pronoun (could be 'she/they/You-formal' by context).
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Blog'; masculine accusative singular (could also be 'their' by context).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'startet'.

sentences.target: Der Blog lädt heute sehr langsam.

translations.de: Der Blog lädt heute sehr langsam.
translations.en: The blog is loading very slowly today.
translations.es: Hoy el blog está cargando muy despacio.
translations.fr: Le blog se charge très lentement aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il blog si carica molto lentamente.
translations.yue: 今日個網誌載入得好慢。
translations.pt: Hoje o blog está carregando muito devagar.
translations.vi: Hôm nay blog tải rất chậm.
translations.ar: اليوم المدونة بطيئة جدا في التحميل.
translations.nl: De blog laadt vandaag erg langzaam.
translations.hu: Ma a blog nagyon lassan tölt be.
translations.hi: आज ब्लॉग बहुत धीरे लोड हो रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś blog ładuje się bardzo wolno.
translations.el: Σήμερα το blog φορτώνει πολύ αργά.
translations.nb: Bloggen laster veldig sakte i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini blog memuat sangat lambat.
translations.sv: Bloggen laddar väldigt långsamt i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi blogul se încarcă foarte încet.
translations.cs: Dnes se blog načítá velmi pomalu.
translations.da: Bloggen indlæses meget langsomt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はブログの読み込みがとても遅いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular marking the subject.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; sentence subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Degree adverb intensifying 'langsam'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'lädt'.

sentences.target: Meine Freunde kennen meinen Blog schon.

translations.de: Meine Freunde kennen meinen Blog schon.
translations.en: My friends already know my blog.
translations.es: Mis amigos ya conocen mi blog.
translations.fr: Mes amis connaissent déjà mon blog.
translations.it: I miei amici conoscono già il mio blog.
translations.ko: 내 친구들은 이미 내 블로그를 알고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友们已经知道我的博客了。
translations.yue: 我啲朋友已經知道我個網誌。
translations.ru: Мои друзья уже знают о моём блоге.
translations.pt: Meus amigos já conhecem meu blog.
translations.he: החברים שלי כבר מכירים את הבלוג שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn bè tôi đã biết blog của tôi rồi.
translations.nl: Mijn vrienden kennen mijn blog al.
translations.uk: Мої друзі вже знають про мій блог.
translations.hu: A barátaim már ismerik a blogomat.
translations.hi: मेरे दोस्त मेरे ब्लॉग के बारे में पहले से जानते हैं।
translations.pl: Moi przyjaciele już znają mój blog.
translations.el: Οι φίλοι μου γνωρίζουν ήδη το blog μου.
translations.nb: Vennene mine kjenner allerede til bloggen min.
translations.id: Teman-teman saya sudah tahu blog saya.
translations.sv: Mina vänner känner redan till min blogg.
translations.ro: Prietenii mei știu deja de blogul meu.
translations.cs: Moji kamarádi už znají můj blog.
translations.da: Mine venner kender allerede min blog.
translations.ja: 友だちはもう私のブログのことを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Freunde'; nominative plural (subject).
Common noun; nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person plural (agreeing with 'Freunde').
Possessive determiner modifying 'Blog'; masculine accusative singular (direct object).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'kennen'.
Temporal/adverbial particle indicating prior occurrence.
